commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is needed because the external auth/provider hardening PR lacks real behavior proof and has a concrete OpenRouter reader defect rather than one safe automation-only path.; Needs attention: The diff reduces response-body memory exposure, but the OpenRouter OAuth success path uses a truncating diagnostic reader where an overflow-signaling success-body reader is needed.; Review finding: [P2] Use an... (sha=607e4d847c5a01f896002ddcc70d899e757059ab)
commands.review_summary:
The PR branch changes Discord webhook success parsing plus Google and OpenRouter OAuth response parsing to use bounded SDK response readers.

PR surface: Source +10. Total +10 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main still has unbounded successful reads in Discord webhook send and OpenRouter OAuth. I did not run a live oversized-body repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the external auth/provider hardening PR lacks real behavior proof and has a concrete OpenRouter reader defect rather than one safe automation-only path.

target.title: fix(nextcloud-talk,discord): bound response body reads for webhook and error paths
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Two unbounded response body reads in bundled plugin HTTP paths can let a hostile endpoint exhaust gateway memory:

1. **extensions/nextcloud-talk/src/bot-preflight.ts** — The error body in `probeNextcloudTalkBotResponseFeature` is read via unbounded `response.text()` when the Nextcloud API returns a non-ok status. The success path already uses `readProviderJsonResponse`.

2. **extensions/discord/src/send.webhook.ts** — The webhook send response is parsed via unbounded `response.json()` on the happy path. The error path already uses bounded `readResponseTextLimited`.

## Changes

1. **extensions/nextcloud-talk/src/bot-preflight.ts** (+4/-1) — Replace unbounded `response.text()` with `readResponseTextLimited(response, 4 KiB)` for the Nextcloud API error body.

2. **extensions/discord/src/send.webhook.ts** (+4/-3) — Replace unbounded `response.json()` with `readProviderJsonResponse(response, "Discord webhook send")` for the Discord webhook send response.

## Evidence

- ✅ `pnpm test extensions/nextcloud-talk` — 15 files, 97 tests passed
- ✅ `pnpm test extensions/discord/src/send.webhook.proxy.test.ts` — 1 file, 7 tests passed
- ✅ `pnpm tsgo:extensions` — clean

Both changes follow the same project-wide bound-response-read pattern (#97702, #88401, #97615).

## AI-Assisted

This PR was AI-assisted.
target.author: lwy-2

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
